title: Print Selected Data Fields from Monday group in one click
excerpt: I would like to be able to print a pre-selected range (not a form-viewer function) of data from a group in an automated / semi-automated way. If effect I want to remove the need to hand-write data copying from screen to …

posts.author: simonlellow (Simon Lellow)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to print a pre-selected range (not a form-viewer function) of data from a group in an automated / semi-automated way. If effect I want to remove the need to hand-write data copying from screen to paper. All suggestions welcome. Thanks, in advance, Simon
